records.question: List all distinct product categories.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category

agent.sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category

records.question: Top 5 products by total quantity sold.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 5

naive.sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity_sold FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 5

agent.sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 5

records.question: Total profit per category for completed orders, where profit = quantity * (unit_price - cost).
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) AS profit FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY profit DESC

naive.sql: SELECT products.category, SUM(order_items.quantity * (order_items.unit_price - products.cost)) as total_profit FROM orders JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id WHERE orders.status = 'completed' GROUP BY products.category;

agent.sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) as total_profit FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_profit DESC

records.question: Customers whose total completed spend is above the average completed spend across all customers.
records.gold_sql: WITH spend AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS s FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT c.name, sp.s AS spend FROM spend sp JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = sp.customer_id WHERE sp.s > (SELECT AVG(s) FROM spend) ORDER BY sp.s DESC

naive.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, c.email, c.country, c.signup_date, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_spend
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name, c.email, c.country, c.signup_date
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > (
    SELECT AVG(customer_spend)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) as customer_spend
        FROM orders o2
        JOIN order_items oi2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id
        WHERE o2.status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY o2.customer_id
    )
)

agent.sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_completed_spend FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > (SELECT AVG(customer_spend) FROM (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) as customer_spend FROM orders o2 JOIN order_items oi2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id WHERE o2.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o2.customer_id)) ORDER BY total_completed_spend DESC

records.question: Monthly completed revenue in 2024 with a running cumulative total.
records.gold_sql: SELECT month, revenue, SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total FROM (SELECT substr(o.order_date, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY month) ORDER BY month

naive.sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month,
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS monthly_revenue
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
  WHERE o.status = 'completed' 
    AND strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024'
  GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)
)
SELECT 
  month,
  monthly_revenue,
  SUM(monthly_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM monthly_data
ORDER BY month;

agent.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) as month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as monthly_revenue, SUM(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)) as cumulative_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) ORDER BY month

records.question: Each category's share (percentage) of total completed revenue.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) FROM order_items oi2 JOIN orders o2 ON o2.order_id = oi2.order_id WHERE o2.status = 'completed'), 2) AS pct_of_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY pct_of_revenue DESC

naive.sql:
SELECT 
    p.category,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / 
        (SELECT SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price) 
         FROM order_items oi2
         JOIN orders o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id
         WHERE o2.status = 'completed'), 2) as percentage_share
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY percentage_share DESC;

agent.sql: WITH completed_revenue AS (SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as category_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category), total_revenue AS (SELECT SUM(category_revenue) as total FROM completed_revenue) SELECT cr.category, ROUND(100.0 * cr.category_revenue / tr.total, 2) as percentage_share FROM completed_revenue cr CROSS JOIN total_revenue tr ORDER BY cr.category_revenue DESC

records.question: The best-selling product by quantity within each category.
records.gold_sql: WITH sales AS (SELECT p.category AS category, p.name AS name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) AS rnk FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id) SELECT category, name, qty FROM sales WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY category

naive.sql:
SELECT category, product_id, name, total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.category,
        p.product_id,
        p.name,
        SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) as rn
    FROM products p
    JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
    GROUP BY p.category, p.product_id, p.name
)
WHERE rn = 1

agent.sql: SELECT category, name, total_quantity FROM (SELECT p.category, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total_quantity, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC) as rn FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category, p.product_id, p.name) WHERE rn = 1

records.question: Top 3 categories by profit margin percentage (profit / revenue) on completed orders.
records.gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS margin_pct FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY margin_pct DESC LIMIT 3

naive.sql:
SELECT 
    p.category,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) as profit_margin_percentage
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY profit_margin_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

agent.sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as total_revenue, SUM(oi.quantity * p.cost) as total_cost, (SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - SUM(oi.quantity * p.cost)) / SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) * 100 as profit_margin_pct FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY profit_margin_pct DESC LIMIT 3
